[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11110101 6
1 10010011 4
2 01011001 4
3 11001110 5
4 00000010 1
5 11111111 a
6 11111111 a
7 11111111 a

01 10 11111111 a match 5 6 7
12 21 10111111 7
